subject: Re: CZM Visit
body:
see you tomorrow

--- John Amerling <jamerling@rrcaribbean.com> wrote:

> This will confirm the message which I just left for
> you at the island. I
> have spoken with Ms. Peterson of CZM. I have been
> told that 4 persons will
> arrive at about 10:30 to conduct the site review.
> They are coming on the
> DPNR boat.  I have taken the liberty of asking
> Carlos to pick me up at 9 in
> Red Hook to be there well in advance of their
> arrival. I plan to go up to
> the complex when I arrive, unless these plans are
> not acceptable to you. If
> not, please let me know. 
> 
> 


__________________________________________________
Do You Yahoo!?

body_html:
see you tomorrow

--- John Amerling jamerling@rrcaribbean.com wrote:

This will confirm the message which I just left for
you at the island. I
have spoken with Ms. Peterson of CZM. I have been
told that 4 persons will
arrive at about 10:30 to conduct the site review.
They are coming on the
DPNR boat. I have taken the liberty of asking
Carlos to pick me up at 9 in
Red Hook to be there well in advance of their
arrival. I plan to go up to
the complex when I arrive, unless these plans are
not acceptable to you. If
not, please let me know.
